description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a sleek, rectangular display framed by a thin, matte black bezel. The screen is supported by a sturdy, rectangular pedestal stand that connects to a wide, flat base, providing stability. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding, giving it a minimalist appearance. The side profile reveals the monitor's slim depth, with the display panel and stand both maintaining a low-profile silhouette. The materials appear to be primarily matte-finished plastic, with possible internal metal reinforcements for structural support. The overall design is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for office, home, or public urban environments.
description: A slim, matte black flat-panel computer monitor with a thin bezel and a wide, rectangular pedestal stand. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large, flat black display framed by a thin bezel, with the pedestal stand and wide base visible below.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the monitor's slim profile and the vertical alignment of the stand and base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a smooth, unmarked back panel with the central support stand and wide base clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the thinness of the display and the straight, vertical support.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and matte black, with sharp corners and no visible texture or decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat rectangular base, made of matte black plastic with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
